title: the file manager: Your File Manager
drDigitalIntro:
The file manager is the app that shows all your files and folders.
• The list on the left is called the sidebar.
• It has shortcuts: Home, Documents, Pictures, Downloads, and Trash.
• Click any of them to jump straight there.

playgroundTask.goal: Use the sidebar to move between places

steps.say: The sidebar on the left jumps between places. Click Pictures.
Now click Downloads to see what's saved there.
Click Home to return to your main files. That's how you get around in the file manager!

drDigitalSuccess: You used the sidebar to visit Pictures, Downloads, and Home. That's how you navigate everywhere in the file manager.
drDigitalHint: Single-click the glowing place in the sidebar on the left.
